title: North Arc Systems
content:
North Arc Systems is a maritime logistics company founded in 1882 and headquartered in Brunevale. Zara Jordan served as chief executive during its international expansion phase.

History.

Zara Jordan negotiated distribution agreements that opened markets in two neighboring republics.

Operations.

Annual reports show steady revenue growth after diversification into overseas service contracts.

Products.

Competitors accused the company of undercutting service contracts, prompting a trade review.

Corporate affairs.

A factory modernization program in 1942 automated assembly lines for turbine control modules.

Controversy.

Brand spin-offs now cover software diagnostics sold to municipal transport agencies.

History.

The firm's research division partners with universities testing next-generation alloys.
